Hero.title: Corentin Juste
Hero.bioParagraph1: As a data scientist with two years of work-study experience in the banking sector, I have had the opportunity to work on projects where data has a direct impact on the business: evaluating the effectiveness of marketing campaigns, detecting transactions to crypto platforms, and optimising and automating credit risk and fraud reporting.
Hero.bioParagraph2: What drives me is both the technical depth of a well-designed model and the tangible impact it can have on operational business decisions. I’m particularly drawn to the fast-evolving nature of the field: tools keep improving, and the solutions we build are becoming increasingly ambitious. This constant need to adapt is both an intellectual challenge and a source of motivation for me.
Hero.bioParagraph3: I’m now looking for my first full-time role as a Data Scientist or AI Engineer, in a stimulating environment where I can continue to grow and take on new challenges.

Parcours.helperText: Click on an experience to see the details.

experiences.title: Data Scientist Apprentice
experiences.preview: Measured CRM campaigns' performance and detected flows to crypto platforms using NLP.
experiences.role: As part of the CCF Data team, I work on two main areas: evaluating the true impact of CRM campaigns on customer behavior, and detecting financial flows to cryptocurrency platforms for regulatory compliance (KYC) purposes.
responsibilities: Designed a causal inference methodology to evaluate CRM campaigns, addressing the absence of control groups in campaign targeting
Built monthly synthetic control groups using Propensity Score Matching (PSM) to reconstruct counterfactuals and isolate the campaigns’ incremental impact
Developed a Power BI dashboard to monitor post-campaign customer behavior (subscriptions, incoming/outgoing financial flows over a two-month period)
Developed an NLP-based classification pipeline on banking transaction labels to identify flows to cryptocurrency platforms
Contributed to regulatory compliance and customer due diligence (KYC) initiatives
accomplishments: Delivered the first reliable measurement of CRM campaigns’ incremental impact at CCF, enabling a clear distinction between generated revenue and natural customer behavior trends
Deployed a production-ready NLP model for classifying banking transactions

experiences.title: Data Project Assistant Apprentice
experiences.preview: Designed and deployed a Power BI dashboard for operational monitoring of CRM campaigns, updated daily.
experiences.role: My first assignment at CCF Bank, where I joined the CRM team. I built a multi-channel campaign performance tracking tool that became the team’s go-to solution for daily operational monitoring.
responsibilities: Designed and deployed a Power BI dashboard for operational monitoring of CRM campaigns, updated on a daily basis
Tracked end-to-end campaign performance across all channels, including open rates, attachment click-through rates, and unsubscribe rates
Maintained and enhanced the tool based on feedback and evolving needs from the CRM team
accomplishments: Dashboard adopted as the internal reference tool for daily campaign performance monitoring by the CRM team

experiences.title: Data Analyst Intern
experiences.preview: Designed and deployed a Qlik Sense dashboard to monitor IT support activity within the Information Systems department.
experiences.role: As part of the IT application support team, working closely with business teams, I designed and developed an operational monitoring tool to track service quality in real time and identify bottlenecks in request handling.
responsibilities: Designed and developed a Qlik Sense dashboard to monitor support activity
Tracked key operational KPIs, including response rate, resolution time, and resolution rate based on ticket criticality
Identified bottlenecks in support request processing
accomplishments: Delivered a tool enabling the team to monitor service quality in real time, adopted for daily operational tracking of support activity

ProjectsSection.sectionDescription: Real problems, real data, measurable results.

BlogSection.sectionDescription: Field notes, tutorials and reflections on Data Science in production.
